viewsContainers.conversations.title: Conversations
views.sessions.name: Sessions
config.title: Conversation Manager — AI
config.ai.endpoint.markdownDescription:
AI API base URL (e.g. `https://api.openai.com/v1` or `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta`)

> 🔐 **API Key** is stored via OS-level secure storage. Set it via Command Palette: `Ctrl+Shift+P` → `Conversations: Set AI API Key`
config.ai.format.description: API format: openai (chat/completions + Bearer) or gemini (generateContent + ?key=)
config.ai.prompt.markdownDescription: System prompt for AI summarization. Leave empty to use the built-in default.
config.ai.autoSummarize.markdownDescript:
Auto-summarize conversations on startup.
- `ask`: Prompt before running
- `on`: Run silently
- `off`: Disabled
config.ai.minMessages.description: Minimum message count for auto-summarize. Conversations with fewer messages are skipped.
config.ai.cooldownHours.description: Skip conversations modified within this many hours (likely still in progress).
config.ai.staleThreshold.description: Message increase threshold to invalidate an existing summary. When a conversation gains this many new messages since its last summary, the summary is cleared for re-generation.
config.archiveKeywords.markdownDescripti:
Auto-archive keyword list. Conversations containing any of these keywords in user messages will be automatically marked as archived during loading. You can also manually toggle archive via the inline button.

Set to an empty array `[]` to disable auto-detection.
